2018 Turkish presidential election  
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia  

Results  
Candidate | Party | Votes | %  
Recep Tayyip Erdoğan | AKP (People’s Alliance) | 25,320,110 | 52.59  
Muharrem İnce | CHP | 16,867,920 | 30.64  

Note: The official Supreme Election Council (YSK) final tally recorded 25,320,110 votes for the winning candidate and 16,867,920 for Muharrem İnce, a difference of 8,452,190 votes.
